name: legacyops-console
description: LegacyOps Console — Enterprise CRM with Siebel-like bridge, anti-corruption layer, migration engine and legacy observability.

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter './packages/**' build && pnpm --filter @legacyops/api build && pnpm --filter @legacyops/web build
scripts.lint: echo 'Lint is intentionally not enforced in this scaffold. See README -> Limitations.' && exit 0
